global_description: Medium-sized waterfowl with a long neck, rounded body, and webbed feet. Feathers are predominantly white or gray with black accents. The beak is flat and orange, and the legs are typically orange or pink.

part_details.head: Small with a flat orange beak and black eyes
part_details.neck: Long and slender, connecting head to body
part_details.body: Rounded with smooth white or gray feathers
part_details.wings: Large and strong, covered in feathers
part_details.feet: Webbed, orange or pink, adapted for swimming

spatial_relations: Neck extends from body to head
Wings attached to sides of body
